ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Framework or library used to build the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that made the prediction */,
  "y_pred_test" REAL /* Predicted value */,
  "y_pred_test_rounded" INTEGER /* Rounded predicted value */,
  "y_true" INTEGER /* Actual value */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "input_features" TEXT /* Input features used for the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that the metric belongs to */,
  "mse" REAL /* Mean squared error */,
  "acc" REAL /* Accuracy */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score */,
  "test_predictions_nn" REAL /* Neural network test predictions */,
  "test_predictions_nn_rounded" INTEGER /* Rounded neural network test predictions */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metrics were calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aggregated_metrics" (
  "agg_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aggregated metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that the aggregated metric belongs to */,
  "agg_mse" REAL /* Aggregated mean squared error */,
  "agg_acc" REAL /* Aggregated accuracy */,
  "agg_stat" REAL /* Aggregated statistic */,
  "agg_date" TEXT /* Date the aggregated metrics were calculated */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period for which the metrics were aggregated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agg_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aggregated_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions_nn" (
  "nn_prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neural network prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that the prediction belongs to */,
  "test_predictions_nn" REAL /* Neural network test predictions */,
  "test_predictions_nn_rounded" INTEGER /* Rounded neural network test predictions */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the neural network prediction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nn_prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_nn_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that the statistic belongs to */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic */,
  "stat_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "median" REAL /* Median of the statistic */,
  "mode" REAL /* Mode of the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_statistics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_models" (
  "user_model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-model pair */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the user was granted access to the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_models_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_models_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that the flag belongs to */,
  "flag_name" TEXT /* Name of the flag */,
  "flag_value" INTEGER /* Value of the flag */,
  "flag_date" TEXT /* Date the flag was set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_flags_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that the comment belongs to */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
